summary: Sprint 1 'Rendre visible l'existant' — Leagues + Streak Saver + Sunday 20h email reminder. 10/10 backend pytest pass. Frontend Leagues page, navbar link, and Dashboard streak-saver wiring all render correctly with required data-testids. No blocking issues.
critical_code_review_comments: Leagues.jsx fmtCountdown: when d > 0, format only shows j/h/min (no seconds). The 1s setInterval keeps decrementing 'countdown' state in memory, but the visible string only changes when a minute boundary is crossed. Acceptable UX for a week-long timer, but worth noting that 'live each second' is technically only true on the last hour. Optionally render seconds when d===0 && h===0.

streak_saver endpoint (gamification.py:171): the eligibility check uses `last_date not in (day_before,)` which is just `last_date != day_before`. If a user missed 2+ days, sauvetage is denied with same 400 — UX could clarify the reason (different message for 'too late' vs 'too early').

_ensure_league_membership: cohort_id is `{week_key}-{tier}-{bucket%10000:04d}` which generates 10000 buckets — for low traffic this means most users will be alone in their cohort (confirmed during test: admin cohort had 1/30). Once user base grows this is fine, but in low-traffic environments LEAGUE_COHORT_SIZE=30 won't be reached. Consider grouping by tier only or smaller modulo until DAU > 300.

send_league_reminders: targets ranks LEAGUE_PROMOTE..LEAGUE_PROMOTE+3 (i.e. ranks 6,7,8) for promote-edge, and (n-RELEGATE-3..n-RELEGATE-1) for relegate-edge. If cohort size < 9 the relegate window can overlap promote zone — guard with `n >= 9` or skip cohorts where ranges overlap.
Leagues.jsx api call has no .catch() — a 401 (cookie expired) would silently leave the page stuck on 'data=null → returns null'. Add error UI + retry button.
StreakSaverModal does not refresh user.credits in real time after save — relies on parent's onSaved callback to refetch user. Verified Dashboard does refetch (handleSaved). OK.

daily_email.send_league_reminders: per-user `db.users.find_one({_id: ObjectId(m['user_id'])})` inside the cohort loop is O(N) Mongo round-trips. For now (<5 reminders/cohort) it's fine, but consider $in batch lookup once cohorts fill up.
test_credentials: admin@generaquiz.fr / Admin2026!. Throwaway TEST_lg_* and TEST_ss_* users created at runtime (patched directly in MongoDB to set streak_current/streak_last_date/credits for streak-saver eligibility test).
seed_data_creation: test_lg_<ts>@example.com (full league flow user), test_ss_<ts>@example.com (streak saver eligibility user, patched in DB: streak_current=3, streak_last_date=day_before_yesterday, credits=50→40 after save).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 1 backend wiring verified: (a) GET /api/gamification/leagues/current 200 with full payload + lazy enrollment for new users (my_xp=0 + is_me=true in leaderboard); (b) POST /api/attempts increments league_scores.xp by score*XP_PER_CORRECT_CATEGORY (1 per correct); (c) POST /api/coop-challenges/{token}/answer with correct answer_index increments league_scores.xp (solo XP=100); (d) POST /api/gamification/streak-saver returns 400 if streak<2 OR last_date != yesterday-1, returns 200 and decrements credits by 10 + sets streak_last_date=yesterday when eligible; (e) send_league_reminders() callable, returns dict with 'sent' key (no_resend_key reason in this env since RESEND_API_KEY is empty). Scheduler has all 5 expected jobs (daily_quiz_email, leagues_weekly_settle, mistral_regenerate_all, premium_expiration_email_j7, league_reminder_sunday_20h). Coop create payload requires players: [{name, role:'senior'|'jeune'}, ...]; coop answer payload uses 'answer_index' (NOT 'selected_index'). Email lowercase normalization on register — DB lookups must use email.lower(). Frontend /app/leagues, /app/dashboard verified; nav-leagues link present (visible in screenshot, intermittent query_selector race during navbar hydration is a TEST timing issue not a bug).
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues. Test iterations needed adjustments for: (1) attempt endpoint path is /api/attempts (not /api/quiz/attempts), (2) coop payload schema requires players array with role enum senior|jeune, (3) coop answer uses answer_index field name, (4) MongoDB email lookups need .lower() because auth lowercases emails on register, (5) pytest async tests run via asyncio.run() rather than pytest.mark.asyncio (no plugin installed).
